hero.name: Julio Zorro
hero.title: Software Engineer · AI
hero.tagline: I build intelligent systems and the interfaces that make them feel human.

about.label: About
about.heading: From satellite firmware on avocado farms to conversational AI.
about.bio:
I'm an electronic engineer from Universidad de los Andes. For five years I co-built an AgriTech startup where everyone touched everything. My corner: firmware with finite state machines, transmitting sensor data through low-earth-orbit satellites to reach farms with no cellular coverage, and calculating evapotranspiration from weather data to tell Hass avocado growers exactly when to irrigate. We tested it on a real working farm for over a year. Part of that work ended up published in Nature Scientific Reports in 2024.

While building the startup I also taught at Universidad Santo Tomás: programming, control systems, circuits, AI and data engineering. The part I keep coming back to is that moment when someone finally gets something complex you explained simply. Now I'm building conversational AI agents with LangGraph and the interfaces around them. The places that interest me most are the ones where nobody expects AI yet.
about.approach: I come from hardware: firmware that has to survive in a field, sensors that feed real decisions. That background makes me think about what breaks in production, what a farmer actually needs to see on a screen, and whether the system still works when the connection drops.

iot.label: Hardware & IoT
iot.body: Firmware, LEO satellite connectivity, and evapotranspiration models for Hass avocado farms. Field-tested for over a year. Published in Nature Scientific Reports (2024).

university.label: Santo Tomás
university.body: Taught programming, control systems, circuits, and AI courses in parallel with the startup. Still learning from students as much as they learn from me.

now.label: Now
now.body: Building conversational AI agents with LangGraph. Focused on agriculture, industry, and education: places where AI shows up and surprises people.

agent.title: Conversational Agent
agent.description: A multi-turn conversational agent built with LangGraph. Memory, tool use, and structured reasoning orchestrated in a single graph.

sinergia.title: Estudio Sinergia
sinergia.description: Marketing site for a creative studio. Fast, accessible, and built to convert. Astro's island architecture keeps it near-zero JS by default.

haz.title: HAZ Arquitectura
haz.description: Portfolio and services site for a Bogotá-based architecture firm with 30+ years of experience. Image-first, bilingual-ready.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Let's build something.
contact.available: Currently available for freelance and full-time opportunities.
